title: The Embedding Space
author: Zachary Proser
description: How embedding models turn text into geometry, how cosine similarity and approximate nearest-neighbor search work, and where production semantic systems fail.

blueprint.subject: EMBEDDINGS
blueprint.subtitle: Applied AI runs on a map where meaning has direction, distance, and neighborhoods. Here is how that map is built and searched.
rfiSuggestions: When should I use cosine similarity instead of dot product?
How do I choose an embedding model and lock its version?
Why did my nearest-neighbor search miss the obvious result?
